mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, image_path, image_type, sort_order, created_at FROM product_images WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY image_type DESC, sort_order ASC
SELECT id, product_id, image_path, image_type, sort_order, created_at FROM product_images WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND image_type = 'THUMBNAIL' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_images WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND image_type = 'DETAIL'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_images (product_id, image_path, image_type, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{imagePath}, #{imageType}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
